nodes.label: rize-desktop CI Pipeline (build/test/lint on macos-15)
nodes.rationale: RIZ-58: the Test step and everything downstream is gated by the single RIZ_58_TESTS_ENABLED flag; the 15-minute job timeout is a safety net against a prior 44-minute runner hang (historic green runs took ~3.5 minutes).

nodes.label: Desktop Coverage Gate (COVERAGE_THRESHOLD 80, coverage-check.sh)
nodes.rationale: RIZ-42 introduced the single-knob app-target line-coverage gate; RIZ-67 raised it from 50 to 80 after closing the first-party coverage gap. Enforced by scripts/coverage-check.sh against the xcresult bundle.

edges.source_location: both run scripts/coverage-check.sh against an xcresult bundle with COVERAGE_THRESHOLD=80 and sticky PR comments
